wikitext.*:
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Chuck uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. Chuck will always lead with his signature Pokémon, {{p|Poliwrath}}.

======[[Johto Leaders Tournament]]======
